# Date Picker

## 用例设计

### Footer

- `renderExtraFooter` 属性与 `Other DS` 设计不同，这个属性用于直接覆盖默认 `footer`
- 对于 `DatePicker` 来说，当面板 `mode` 为 `date` 并且 `showToday` 为 true 时，存在默认的 `Today` 按钮，点击以后可以选中今天
- 对于 `RangePicker` 来说，当面板 `mode` 为 `date` 并且 `ranges` 不为空时，存在多个预设按钮，和一个确认按钮
  - 点击预设按钮只改变面板状态，不触发 `onChange`，不改变最终的组件值
  - 点击确定改变最终的组件值，并且关闭面板

Focus: start

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    #
    # Focus none，focus none 和 confirm none 强关联
    #
    state "value: [void, void], focus: none, confirm: none" as s0000
    state "value: [date, void], focus: none, confirm: none" as s1000
    state "value: [void, date], focus: none, confirm: none" as s0100
    state "value: [date, date], focus: none, confirm: none" as s1100

    [*] --> s0000
    [*] --> s1000
    [*] --> s0100
    [*] --> s1100

    #
    # Focus start
    #
    state "value: [void, void], focus: start, confirm: none" as s0010
    state "value: [void, void], focus: start, confirm: start" as s0011
    state "value: [void, void], focus: start, confirm: end" as s0012

    s0000 --> s0010: 点击 input start time
    s0010 --> s0011: 点击开始时间 cell
    s0011 --> s0012: 点击结束时间 cell
    s0012 --> s1100: 关闭 overlay，value 变为 [date, date]

    s0010 --> s0000: 中断选择
    s0011 --> s0000: 中断选择

    state "value: [date, void], focus: start, confirm: none" as s1010
    state "value: [date, void], focus: start, confirm: start" as s1011
    state "value: [date, void], focus: start, confirm: end" as s1012

    s1000 --> s1010: 点击 input start time
    s1010 --> s1011: 点击开始时间 cell
    s1011 --> s1012: 点击结束时间 cell
    s1012 --> s1100: 关闭 overlay，value 变为 [date, date]

    s1010 --> s1000: 中断选择
    s1011 --> s1000: 中断选择

    state "value: [void, date], focus: start, confirm: none" as s0110
    state "value: [void, date], focus: start, confirm: start" as s0111
    # state "value: [void, date], focus: start, confirm: end" as s0112

    s0100 --> s0110: 点击 input start time
    s0110 --> s0111: 点击开始时间 cell
    s0111 --> s1100: 关闭 overlay，value 变为 [date, date]

    state "value: [date, date], focus: start, confirm: none" as s1110
    state "value: [date, date], focus: start, confirm: start" as s1111
    # state "value: [date, date], focus: start, confirm: end" as s1112

    s1100 --> s1110: 点击 input start time
    s1110 --> s1111: 点击开始时间 cell
    s1111 --> s1100: 关闭 overlay，value 变为 [date, date]

    #
    # Focus all
    #
    state "value: [void, void], focus: all, confirm: none" as s0030
    state "value: [void, void], focus: all, confirm: start" as s0031
    state "value: [void, void], focus: all, confirm: end" as s0032

    s0000 --> s0030: 点击 triggerElement
    s0030 --> s0031: 点击开始时间 cell
    s0031 --> s0032: 点击结束时间 cell
    s0032 --> s1100: 关闭 overlay，value 变为 [date, date]

    s0030 --> s0000: 中断选择
    s0031 --> s0000: 中断选择

    state "value: [date, void], focus: all, confirm: none" as s1030
    state "value: [date, void], focus: all, confirm: start" as s1031
    state "value: [date, void], focus: all, confirm: end" as s1032

    s1000 --> s1030: 点击 triggerElement
    s1030 --> s1031: 点击开始时间 cell
    s1031 --> s1032: 点击结束时间 cell
    s1032 --> s1100: 关闭 overlay，value 变为 [date, date]

    s1030 --> s1000: 中断选择
    s1031 --> s1000: 中断选择

    state "value: [void, date], focus: all, confirm: none" as s0130
    state "value: [void, date], focus: all, confirm: start" as s0131
    state "value: [void, date], focus: all, confirm: end" as s0132

    s0100 --> s0130: 点击 triggerElement
    s0130 --> s0131: 点击开始时间 cell
    s0131 --> s0132: 点击结束时间 cell
    s0132 --> s1100: 关闭 overlay，value 变为 [date, date]

    s0130 --> s0100: 中断选择
    s0131 --> s0100: 中断选择

    state "value: [date, date], focus: all, confirm: none" as s1130
    state "value: [date, date], focus: all, confirm: start" as s1131
    state "value: [date, date], focus: all, confirm: end" as s1132

    s1100 --> s1130: 点击 triggerElement
    s1130 --> s1131: 点击开始时间 cell
    s1131 --> s1132: 点击结束时间 cell
    s1132 --> s1100: 关闭 overlay，value 变为 [date, date]

    s1130 --> s1100: 中断选择
    s1130 --> s1100: 中断选择
```

Focus: end，刚好是 Focus start 的反向操作

### showTime

当设置 showTime 时，显示时间选择。 显示格式变为： YYYY-

1. 如何设置显示哪些选项（时、分、秒）？

- 通过 format 识别
- 通过 showTime 指定

2. confirmButton 逻辑
   1. 非 showTime （默认）
      1. confirmButton = false (默认) 选中即提交
      2. confirmButton = true 选中点击确定按钮提交，点击弹窗外部 取消
   2. showTime !== false
      1. confirmButton = true （默认） 选中点击确定按钮提交，点击弹窗外部取消
      2. confirmButton = false, 点击外部提交， 点击内部弹窗不关闭。

### defaultPickerValue

参考： [defaultPickerValue 的设计](https://bytedance.feishu.cn/docx/doxcnL1AFiZAwco4vrVouyhAeBc)

### 面板切换策略

文字描述：「用户完全控制 + Phase 或 viewValue 变化，引起的 pickerValue 变化」

#### 默认值

value > defaultPickerValue > now()

#### 触发事件

我们不选择使用 render compute，而是事件触发，因为在某些情况下我们的 pickerValue 值是会根据 event 不同而使用不同的。

| 事件                        | 引起变化类型                                                                                                                                           | 说明                                                             |
| --------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 清空                        | viewValue 变化                                                                                                                                         |                                                                  |
| input[onChange]             | viewValue 变化                                                                                                                                         |                                                                  |
| 点击 pre/next               | 用户完全控制                                                                                                                                           |                                                                  |
| focus(点击，Tab 切换) input | Phase 变化                                                                                                                                             |                                                                  |
| 切换年份                    | 用户完全控制                                                                                                                                           |                                                                  |
| 点击 date cell              | viewValue 变化（Phase 其实也会变化，但是我们这里会用 current phase 而非 next phase 进行计算，因为我们认为点击 date cell 和 input onChange 是等价操作） | 此时可能点击到上个面板或者下个面板透出来的日期，此时需要面板跳转 |

#### 切换规则

1. 按当前 phase 取出 viewValue 中对应的 date 值
2. 计算 nextPickerValue 值（viewValue[phase] > defaultPickerValue[phase]）
   1. 若 nextPickerValue 为空，则不切换
   2. 若 nextPickerValue 不为空，则切换。这里要注意，当 phase 是 startDate 时，pickerValue 设置为 nextPickerValue，当 phase 是 endDate 时，将 pickerValue 设置为 prev(nextPickerValue, mode)

## 光标跟随输入定位

当用户在面板中选中一个日期后，光标会自动跳转到下个 phase 对应的输入框。如选择了开始时间，接下来应该要选择结束时间，此时光标应该从开始时间跳转到结束时间。
几个交互场景：https://bytedance.feishu.cn/docx/doxcnKjyRtPEDa2tIXZZdG2fASd
